creator: doctor@doctor.nl2k.ab.ca
text:
Just updated to to 4.2.7  

and getting

2024/02/17 02:14:41 [error] 44879#100857: *3 kevent() reported that connect() failed (61: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream, client: 204.209.81.3, server: mastodon.nk.ca, request: "GET /api/v1/timelines/home HTTP/2.0", upstream: "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/v1/timelines/home", host: "mastodon.nk.ca", referrer: "https://mastodon.nk.ca/home"
